title: Sleep Cycle Calculator - Optimal Wake Up Time
description: Free sleep cycle calculator. Find the best time to wake up or go to sleep based on 90-minute sleep cycles for refreshed mornings.
keywords: sleep cycle calculator, wake up time calculator, sleep schedule, REM cycle, optimal sleep time
intro: Calculate optimal wake-up times based on 90-minute sleep cycles. Waking between cycles helps you feel more refreshed.

faq.q: How long is one sleep cycle?
faq.a: One complete sleep cycle lasts approximately 90 minutes and includes light sleep, deep sleep, and REM stages.

faq.q: How many sleep cycles do I need?
faq.a: Most adults need 5-6 complete cycles (7.5-9 hours) per night for optimal health and cognitive function.

faq.q: Why do I feel tired after 8 hours of sleep?
faq.a: You may be waking in the middle of a deep sleep phase. Try adjusting your wake time by 15-30 minutes to align with cycle completion.
